rows.description: A Bill for repairs at J. Downinghton in acct. for Faulkner's Rents, recd. Decr. 20. 1828 & omitted to be charged in the last comp.
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both. Description refined based on visual inspection, preferring 'J. Downinghton', 'Faulkner's Rents', and 'comp.' as per gemini-flash's transcription, which is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's interpretation.
rows.english_description: Bill for repairs at Downinghton relating to Faulkner's rents; received 20 December 1828 and omitted from the previous account.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Bill for repairs at Downinghton relating to Faulkner's rents, amounting to £3 15s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr. Davenport Bill for Surveys Agency &c.          for 1829 = 33.li.5 To Do: Do: for Superintendence of Building the School at Kidlington -- 26.5.0
rows.notes: Adopted gemini-flash's interpretation. The image clearly shows a braced group for this entry with a single final amount of 59/11/5 in the main ledger columns. The values '33.li.5' and '26.5.0' are part of the description (internal calculations). gpt-5-mini incorrectly split this into three separate rows with incorrect amounts, which were dropped.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Davenport for survey/agency work for 1829 and for superintending the building of the school at Kidlington.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Davenport for survey/agency work for 1829 and for superintending the building of the school at Kidlington, amounting to £59 11s 5d.
